economic_notes: Montreal Lake Business Ventures Limited Partnership (99.99% owned) generated net earnings of $1,026,319 in 2023 with revenue of $8,052,998. Woodland Cree Enterprises Incorporated is a government partnership proportionately consolidated providing training and educational support. La Ronge Wild Rice Corporation held as portfolio investment at cost (5.3% ownership).
notes: Fiscal year ends March 31, 2023 (not 2024). Province is Saskatchewan. Nation adopted new PSAB standards effective April 1, 2022 for Asset Retirement Obligations (PS 3280) and Financial Instruments (PS 3450) prospectively — no restatement of prior periods. Asset retirement obligations of $395,912 recognized for first time this year increasing liabilities and TCA. Deferred revenue is very large at $23.4M relative to total revenue. Montreal Lake Business Ventures LP and Montreal Lake Business Ventures Limited are accounted for under modified equity method as GBEs. Eight entities fully consolidated including two reserves, two health centres, housing program, store, detox centre, and urban services. Woodland Cree Enterprises proportionately consolidated as government partnership. Schedule of remuneration not included in extracted text.
